# Test Fixtures

Place test CV files here for integration testing.

## Suggested test files:
- `sample_en.pdf` - Standard English CV (1 column)
- `sample_vi.pdf` - Vietnamese CV
- `sample_multi_column.pdf` - Multi-column/sidebar layout
- `sample_scan.pdf` - Scanned PDF (image-based)
- `sample_with_textbox.docx` - DOCX with text boxes
- `not_a_cv.pdf` - PDF that is not a CV (e.g., invoice)
